title: Subtracting decimals: thousandths
description: Subtract two numbers that are written to the tenths, hundredths, or thousandths place.
topic_path: Module 2: Arithmetic operations including dividing by a fraction
Topic B: Multi‐digit decimal operations—adding, subtracting, and multiplying

hints:
Let's align the place values first.

Then we can regroup the place values so that every place value has enough to subtract.

:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:|:-:
||||||
|$5$ | $9$ | $.$ | $\maroonE{7}$ | $\maroonE{0}$ | $\goldE{0}$
$-$ | | $0$ | $.$ | $4$ | $4$ | $6$
